Title: Don Matteo
Writer: Alessandro Bencivenni, Domenico Saverni, Enrico Oldoini
Actors: Nino Frassica, Nathalie Guettà, Francesco Scali
Plot: Terence Hill stars as Don Matteo, a thoroughly ordinary Catholic priest with an extraordinary ability to read people and solve crimes. He's a parish priest who never met an unjustly accused person he didn't want to help.
